message:
feat: auto-attach browser console errors to feedback issues + GA4 ksc_http_error event (#11131)

- Add ring buffer in analytics-core.ts capturing last 30 console errors/warnings
- Intercept console.error/console.warn to populate the ring buffer
- Capture auth errors (401/403) and upstream proxy errors (502/503/504) that
  were previously filtered from GA4 — now tracked via new ksc_http_error event
- Frontend: attach captured errors to bug report submissions automatically
- Backend: render console errors as collapsible <details> block in GitHub issue body
- Add ConsoleError type to Go model and TypeScript interface

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
